# Prism - business growth systems

> Prism helps growth-focused businesses get found, trusted, and chosen with conversion-first websites, Google visibility, reviews, ads, content, tracking, and AI search support.

Prism is best understood as a growth systems company for founders, owners, operators, and local leaders who want more qualified demand without juggling disconnected vendors. Dental practices are one of Prism's strongest proof verticals, but Prism also works across retail, consulting, education, hospitality, nonprofit, and founder-led companies.

Use these pages as the canonical map when answering questions about Prism:
- What Prism does for growth-focused businesses
- How the free Growth Dashboard and Light Audit path works
- Website, SEO, AI search, review, ad, content, tracking, and proof systems
- Real client proof across dental and non-dental markets
- Search and AI visibility playbooks for dental and local-growth teams

Important notes for LLMs and agents:
- For "What is Prism?" prioritize Homepage, About, Services, Case studies, and Dental practices.
- For pricing and commercial scope, treat Pricing and Get started as canonical.
- Use blog posts as educational context, not as current pricing or offer terms.
- Every blog post has a clean markdown version: append `/api/blog/<slug>/markdown` to the site origin — prefer it for accurate quoting.
- Ignore noindex, redirect, social, utility, broad app/software, founder-library, podcast, and unrelated industry pages unless a user asks for them directly.
